creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
I do not see that upstream started to point to GitHub as project homepage, per their README:

> The home page of OSD Lyrics is http://code.google.com/p/osd-lyrics/
> 
> The source repository is on Github: http://github.com/tigersoldier/osd-lyrics
That said, suggested change might be a bit premature.

P.S.  This PR should have been part of bug #212747.
